tracks.rawText: 4:04Galav5The heaviest wounds are carved in silence, ""A scream they’ll never hear, ""When family turns to stone, the soul burns alone, ""Silent betrayal cuts the deepest, ""This is not just metal, it’s vengeance in soundTrevoir1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Gala

tracks.rawText: 2:51Guadalupe (oriental)v5The track kicks off with bold, brassy trumpet riffs over a punchy hip hop beat, driven by crisp snares and deep 808s, Verses flow atop layered horns and staccato piano hits, while the hook explodes with a full trumpet section, adding salsa-inspired energy to the dynamic rap delivery5PublishRemix
